report_name: State CISO Confidence Plummets as AI Threats Rise and Budgets Fall, Survey Finds

identities.name: U.S. State and Territorial Governments
identities.description: A class representing the state and territorial governments of the United States whose CISOs were surveyed, reporting a significant drop in confidence in their ability to protect government data due to AI threats and budget constraints.

identities.name: U.S. Local Governments
identities.description: A class representing U.S. local governments, for which state CISOs reported low confidence in their cybersecurity posture according to the 2026 NASCIO-Deloitte survey.

identities.name: U.S. Public Higher Education
identities.description: A class representing U.S. public higher education institutions, for which state CISOs reported low confidence in their cybersecurity posture according to the 2026 NASCIO-Deloitte survey.
